chunks.text: The Besties intro Mark Cuban: Voting record, working with Ross Perot's campaign in 1992
The history of Cuban's love/hate relationship with Trump
Trump's performance as President: what he got right and wrong
Biden's performance as President: what he got right and wrong
Should Kamala share blame for Biden's failures?
International conflict, national debt, crypto regulation
General sense of Kamala Harris, why she's been avoiding adversarial interviews, why Sacks supports Trump
Selling a majority of his Mavericks stake, changing business landscape of the NBA, what he's working on at Cost Plus Drugs
Thoughts on AI, what's next for him
